summary: Frontend-only testing of Bookings page and On-Demand tab. All features working correctly: page loads without errors, all 7 tabs render, On-Demand tab shows location prompt and 'No Photographers Available' message (expected). OnDemandRequestDrawer component structure verified with proper Uber-like flow implementation.
critical_code_review_comments: Bookings.js: OnDemandRequestDrawer component properly implements Uber-like flow with steps: time_select -> confirm -> waiting -> success (lines 301-302)
Quick time selection buttons (15/30/45/60 min) correctly implemented with pricing (lines 316-321, 486-507)
Crew splitting UI with add/remove members and per-person cost calculation working (lines 310-313, 509-559)
Payment method selection (credits vs card) properly implemented with visual feedback (lines 647-695)
Animated waiting state with 60-second countdown timer (lines 324-333, 714-780)
All lucide imports present: Check, Bell, CreditCard (line 7)
No duplicate JSX or syntax errors - lint passes clean
context_for_next_testing_agent: OnDemandRequestDrawer is the Uber-like quick booking component inside Bookings.js (lines 297-831). It cannot be fully tested without an active on-demand photographer. The component structure and UI elements are verified working. The On-Demand tab shows 'No Photographers Available' which is expected behavior when no photographers have on_demand_available=true.

bookings_page_load.details: Page loads with 'Sessions & Bookings' title, no errors

all_tabs_render.details: All 7 tabs found: The Lineup, Live Sessions, On-Demand, Find Buddies, Scheduled, Past, Live Now

on_demand_tab_content.details: Location prompt, 'No Photographers Available' message, and Refresh button all present

on_demand_request_drawer_structure.details: Component verified via code review - proper Uber-like flow with time_select, confirm, waiting, success steps

quick_time_selection.details: 15/30/45/60 min options defined in timeOptions array (lines 316-321)

crew_splitting_ui.details: Add/remove crew members with per-person cost calculation implemented (lines 509-559)

payment_method_selection.details: Credits vs card selection with visual radio buttons (lines 647-695)
